# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
description: A Helm chart for deploying my application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

# Define the Chart's dependencies
dependencies: []

# Define the values used in the templates
values:
  replicaCount: 1
  image:
    repository: my-app-repo
    pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
    tag: "latest"
  service:
    enabled: true
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 80
  ingress:
    enabled: false
  resources: {}

# Define the templates used for deployment
templates:
  - apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ include "my-app.fullname" . }}
      labels:
        {{- include "my-app.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    spec:
      replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: {{ include "my-app.name" . }}
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: {{ include "my-app.name" . }}
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: my-app
              image: {{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}
              imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
              ports:
                - containerPort: 80
              resources:
                {{- toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }}

  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: Service
    metadata:
      name: {{ include "my-app.fullname" . }}
      labels:
        {{- include "my-app.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    spec:
      type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
      ports:
        - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
          targetPort: 80
      selector:
        app: {{ include "my-app.name" . }}

  - apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
    kind: Ingress
    metadata:
      name: {{ include "my-app.fullname" . }}
      annotations:
        kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "nginx"
    spec:
      rules:
        - host: {{ .Values.ingress.host }}
          http:
            paths:
              - path: /
                pathType: Prefix
                backend:
                  service:
                    name: {{ include "my-app.fullname" . }}
                    port:
                      number: {{ .Values.service.port }}
